# Development Log

## Project Name

AI Study Assistant

## AI Coding Assistant Used

* ChatGPT

## AI Model Used

* Google Gemini 2.5 Flash

## Important Prompts Given

* Create an AI-powered study assistant using Streamlit and Gemini API.
* Allow users to upload PDFs, images, and notes.
* Generate summaries from uploaded study materials.
* Generate important questions for revision.
* Generate MCQs with answers.
* Generate flashcards from study content.
* Improve the user interface with a modern dark theme.
* Add quiz mode and difficulty selection.

## Code Generated by AI

The following code sections were generated with AI assistance:

* Streamlit user interface layout.
* PDF processing using PyPDF.
* Image handling using Pillow.
* Gemini API integration.
* Summary generation feature.
* Question generation feature.
* MCQ generation feature.
* Flashcard generation feature.
* Error handling for API rate limits.

## Manual Modifications Made

* Organized project files and folder structure.
* Created GitHub repository.
* Added screenshots to the repository.
* Created README.md documentation.
* Added requirements.txt file.
* Customized UI design and layout.
* Tested application functionality.
* Updated project descriptions and documentation.

## Challenges Faced

* Understanding Streamlit components and layout.
* Processing uploaded PDFs correctly.
* Handling Gemini API quota and rate-limit errors.
* Managing file uploads and image processing.
* Organizing project documentation and GitHub repository.

## Lessons Learned

* How to build AI-powered applications using Streamlit.
* How to integrate Google Gemini API into Python projects.
* How to process PDFs and images in Python.
* How to use GitHub for project management.
* How AI coding assistants can accelerate software development.
* Importance of documentation and testing.

## Final Outcome

Successfully developed an AI-powered study assistant capable of processing notes, PDFs, and images to generate summaries, important questions, quizzes, and flashcards. The project demonstrates practical use of Generative AI to improve student learning and productivity
